calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Michael Keck, Esq. for Plaintiff: Joy Daniels, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, matter submitted and taken under submission for review.
Proposed Judgment received in court.
2:00 P.M.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Bay View Apratments as follows:
Damages $16,000.00
Costs $342.70, for a total of $16,642.70
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
